ogTitle: Point Lonsdale vs Polisbet: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Point Lonsdale and Polisbet.
heading: Point Lonsdale vs Polisbet — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Point Lonsdale, Victoria and Polisbet, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Point Lonsdale has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Polisbet (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Point Lonsdale or Polisbet safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Point Lonsdale has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Polisbet scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Point Lonsdale scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. Polisbet scores 32/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Point Lonsdale or Polisbet?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Point Lonsdale has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.18% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
